title: 0756's Minigames Bundle
description: Optimizations and tweaks to make playing mini-games with friends easier.
body:
0756's Mingames Bundle builds on the original pack, adding new features tailored to playing mingames in a world with your friends.

### 0756's Bundle Features:
- **All features from 0756's Bundle** are included, providing the same performance and QoL featurees to make the game smoother to play.

### Building Tools:
- **WorldEdit** is included to maske building easier and improve build battles.
- Use **Litematica** to consistently make structures to set up a game.

### PVP Additions:
- Adds a **death counter** to help yyou keep score of a game.
- A more **detailed armor bar** lets you manage geat more easily.

### Adventuring:
- **JourneyMap** lets you easily map your world and find what you need.

[Craiyon](https://www.craiyon.com/) was used to generate the icon background.
